---
title: "CDS 303: Scientific Data Mining"
sidebar: teaching
---

## Chapters

1. [Chapter 1: Data Science, Data Mining, and the Process of Turning Data into Knowledge](chapter-1.qmd)
2. [Chapter 2: Context and Data Understanding](chapter-2.qmd)
3. [Chapter 3: Data Preparation and Model Design](chapter-3.qmd)
4. [Chapter 4: Data Modeling - Regression](chapter-4.qmd)
5. [Chapter 5: Data Modeling - Tree-based Models](chapter-5.qmd)
